name: Chicken Wings in Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: The Travelin' Gourmet
Cut each chicken wing into two pieces by separating at the joint; discard the tips.
Heat the ginger slices in the oil in a wok. Add one-third of the wings and brown them.
When the wings are browned, drain the oil and remove the ginger slices from the wok.
Add the oyster sauce, sherry, sugar, soy sauce, and water to the wok.
Place the browned wings back into the wok and simmer, covered, for 10 to 15 minutes.
Cook another 12 to 15 minutes with the lid off, basting frequently with the sauce.
When the wings are tender and nicely glazed, they are ready to be eaten.
